# Generate Playwright UI Test

Create a Playwright TypeScript UI test using this framework.

Rules:
- Use fixtures from src/fixtures/ecommerce.fixture.ts
- Use page objects from src/pages
- Use test data from src/data
- Use tags like @smoke, @cart, @checkout, @regression
- Do not hardcode product names or users
- Do not use waitForTimeout
- Prefer readable test steps

Output:
- Test file path
- Complete test code
- Any page object changes needed
